lex.bot.lambdacodehook.CfnAbout: Specifies a Lambda function that verifies requests to a bot or fulfills the user's request to a bot.

lex.bot.lambdacodehook.CodeHookInterface.Description: Specifies the version of the request-response that you want Amazon Lex to use to invoke your Lambda function.

lex.bot.lambdacodehook.LambdaArn.Description: Specifies the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Lambda function.
